title: Chronik operator ecosystem closeout
goal: Close the remaining Chronik operator-ecosystem integration gaps without turning Chronik into an orchestrator or runtime control surface.
completion: Chronik service bootstrap PR is resolved with CI/local evidence and no runtime activation claim.
Cabinet maps Chronik as append-only ledger and historical evidence axis with bounded ecosystem edges.
Chronik local service activation has an explicit, separately approved gate with rollback and smoke evidence.

metadata.source_context: Chronik integration live closeout after PR 206 and Cabinet PR 83 review

truth_boundaries.chronik: append-only event ledger and historical evidence axis
truth_boundaries.cabinet: orientation and drift/coherence map, not runtime truth
truth_boundaries.heimlern: offline learning and proposal generation only
